assertions.description: RC filter for R19/C13 (100K/22uF, 0.07Hz time constant) is correctly identified. I2C bus on I2C1_SDA correctly shows 3 devices (U4, U5, U3) with R11 pullup. D1 (1N5819) correctly classified as reverse_polarity protection. Component counts (13 caps, 19 resistors, 5 ICs, 3 LEDs) match the BOM. Multi-sheet parsing (2 sheets) is correct.

U1 is a 3.3V LDO (ME6210A33PG, SOT89 package), connected from /CMSIS-DAP/5V_USB input to +3.3V output, but power_regulators is empty []. The part is classified as 'ic' type with a transistor footprint library. The datasheet link also points to AP1117 which is a well-known LDO, suggesting the analyzer failed to match this part name to a regulator pattern.
